title: Purpose Over Profit
description: Every action should be driven by meaning, not material gain. When you find your purpose, success follows naturally.

title: Authentic Expression
description: True art comes from within. Don't create for the algorithm - create for the soul.

title: Continuous Growth
description: Every day is an opportunity to learn something new. Stay curious, stay humble, stay hungry.

title: Community First
description: We rise by lifting others. Build bridges, not walls. Share knowledge freely.

title: Global Perspective
description: Travel opens the mind. Experience different cultures to understand our shared humanity.

title: Creative Courage
description: Fear is the enemy of creation. Take risks, embrace failure, and keep pushing boundaries.
